header.version: 1.1.0 – major ontology refactoring with strengthened semantic interoperability, extensive enrichment of the marine observatory knowledge graph, broader reuse of community standards and external identifiers, enhanced geospatial modelling, and improved FAIR compliance.
author: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Steven_PIEL
https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Ifremer

description.no: Ontologi som beskriver kyst- og dyphavsobservatorier, inkludert alle EMSO-observatorier, som del av den europeiske tverrfaglige infrastrukturen for havbunn og vannsøyle. Må ikke forveksles med OpenScienceOntology (OSO).
description.pt: Ontologia que descreve os observatórios marinhos (infraestruturas regionais, locais, plataformas) para apoiar a gestão FAIR de dados e a interoperabilidade, especialmente no contexto do EMSO ERIC.
description.el: Οντολογία που περιγράφει τα θαλάσσια παρατηρητήρια (περιφερειακές υποδομές, τοποθεσίες, πλατφόρμες) για την υποστήριξη της διαχείρισης δεδομένων FAIR και της διαλειτουργικότητας, ιδιαίτερα στο πλαίσιο του EMSO ERIC.
description.en: Ontology describing coastal and open seas observatories, including all EMSO observatories as part of the European Multidisciplinary Seafloor and Water Column Observatories infrastructure. Not to be confused with the OpenScienceOntology (OSO).
description.it: Ontologia che descrive gli osservatori marini (infrastrutture regionali, siti, piattaforme) per supportare la gestione FAIR dei dati e l’interoperabilità, in particolare nel contesto EMSO ERIC.
description.fr: Ontologie décrivant les observatoires marins côtiers et hauturiers, incluant l’ensemble des observatoires EMSO, dans le cadre de l'infrastructure européenne multidisciplinaire dédiée aux fonds marins et à la colonne d’eau. À ne pas confondre avec l'OpenScienceOntology (OSO).
description.ro: Ontologie care descrie observatoarele marine de coastă și de larg, inclusiv toate observatoarele EMSO, ca parte a infrastructurii europene multidisciplinare a fundului mării și a coloanei de apă. A nu se confunda cu OpenScienceOntology (OSO).
description.es: Ontología que describe los observatorios marinos (infraestructuras regionales, sitios, plataformas) para apoyar la gestión FAIR de datos y la interoperabilidad, especialmente en el contexto de EMSO ERIC.

comments.no: Ontologi som beskriver forholdet mellom regionale fasiliteter, steder, plattformer, forskningsinfrastrukturer, organisasjoner, cruiser og de ansvarlige på hvert nivå.
comments.pt: Ontologia que descreve as relações entre instalações regionais, locais, plataformas, infraestruturas de investigação, organizações, cruzeiros e os responsáveis por cada nível.
comments.el: Το OSO περιλαμβάνει επιλεγμένες σημασιολογικές αντιστοιχίσεις με έννοιες SWEET, ώστε να βελτιωθεί η διαλειτουργικότητα με λεξιλόγια των επιστημών της Γης και του περιβάλλοντος.
comments.en: Ontology describing the relationships between Regional Facilities, Sites, Platforms, Research Infrastructures, Organisations, Cruises, and the persons in charge of each level.
comments.it: OSO include allineamenti semantici selezionati con concetti SWEET per migliorare l'interoperabilità con i vocabolari delle scienze della Terra e dell'ambiente.
comments.fr: Co-construction avec des experts métier et alignement itératif avec des ontologies de référence
comments.ro: Co-construcție cu experți din domeniu și aliniere iterativă cu ontologii de referință
comments.es: Ontología que describe las relaciones entre instalaciones regionales, emplazamientos, plataformas, infraestructuras de investigación, organizaciones, cruceros y las personas responsables de cada nivel.

abstract.value: Η οντολογία OSO οργανώνει τα θαλάσσια παρατηρητήρια σε τρία ιεραρχικά επίπεδα: περιφερειακές υποδομές, τοποθεσίες και πλατφόρμες. Υποστηρίζει τη διαχείριση δεδομένων σύμφωνα με τις αρχές FAIR, τη διαλειτουργικότητα και την ενσωμάτωση πληροφοριών για θαλάσσιες υποδομές, ιδιαίτερα στο πλαίσιο του EMSO ERIC.

Ontologia OSO structurează observatoarele marine în trei niveluri ierarhice: facilități regionale, situri și platforme. Susține gestionarea FAIR a datelor, interoperabilitatea și integrarea informațiilor despre infrastructuri marine, în special în contextul EMSO ERIC.

The OSO ontology structures marine observatories into three hierarchical levels: Regional Facilities, Sites, and Platforms. It supports FAIR data management, interoperability, and integration of heterogeneous marine infrastructure information, particularly within the EMSO ERIC framework.

La ontología OSO estructura los observatorios marinos en tres niveles jerárquicos: infraestructuras regionales, sitios y plataformas. Apoya la gestión FAIR de datos, la interoperabilidad y la integración de información sobre infraestructuras marinas, especialmente en el contexto de EMSO ERIC.

L'ontologia OSO struttura gli osservatori marini in tre livelli gerarchici: infrastrutture regionali, siti e piattaforme. Supporta la gestione FAIR dei dati, l'interoperabilità e l'integrazione delle informazioni sulle infrastrutture marine, in particolare nel contesto EMSO ERIC.

L'ontologie OSO structure les observatoires marins en trois niveaux hiérarchiques : infrastructures régionales, sites et plateformes. Elle soutient la gestion FAIR des données, l'interopérabilité et l'intégration des informations sur les infrastructures marines, notamment dans le cadre d'EMSO ERIC.

A ontologia OSO estrutura os observatórios marinhos em três níveis hierárquicos: infraestruturas regionais, locais e plataformas. Suporta a gestão FAIR de dados, a interoperabilidade e a integração de informações sobre infraestruturas marinhas, especialmente no contexto do EMSO ERIC.

OSO-ontologien strukturerer marine observatorier i tre hierarkiske nivåer: regionale fasiliteter, steder og plattformer. Den støtter FAIR datastyring, interoperabilitet og integrasjon av informasjon om marine infrastrukturer, spesielt i EMSO ERIC-konteksten.

usedOntologyEngineeringMethodology.value: Iterative ontology engineering methodology based on FAIR principles, competency questions, semantic alignments, and ontology reuse.

versionInfo.value: 1.1.0 – major ontology refactoring with strengthened semantic interoperability, extensive enrichment of the marine observatory knowledge graph, broader reuse of community standards and external identifiers, enhanced geospatial modelling, and improved FAIR compliance.

1.1.0 – importante refatoração da ontologia com interoperabilidade semântica reforçada, um enriquecimento significativo do grafo de conhecimento dos observatórios marinhos, uma maior reutilização de normas comunitárias e identificadores externos, uma modelação geoespacial melhorada e uma maior conformidade com os princípios FAIR.

1.1.0 – importante refactorización de la ontología con una interoperabilidad semántica reforzada, un amplio enriquecimiento del grafo de conocimiento de los observatorios marinos, una mayor reutilización de estándares comunitarios e identificadores externos, una modelización geoespacial mejorada y una mayor conformidad con los principios FAIR.

1.1.0 – omfattende omarbeiding av ontologien med styrket semantisk interoperabilitet, betydelig berikelse av kunnskapsgrafen for marine observatorier, økt gjenbruk av fellesskapsstandarder og eksterne identifikatorer, forbedret geospatial modellering og bedre samsvar med FAIR-prinsippene.

1.1.0 – importante rifattorizzazione dell'ontologia con interoperabilità semantica rafforzata, un significativo arricchimento del grafo della conoscenza degli osservatori marini, un maggiore riutilizzo di standard comunitari e identificatori esterni, una modellazione geospaziale migliorata e una migliore conformità ai principi FAIR.

1.1.0 – refactorizare majoră a ontologiei, cu interoperabilitate semantică consolidată, îmbogățirea semnificativă a grafului de cunoștințe al observatoarelor marine, reutilizarea extinsă a standardelor comunitare și a identificatorilor externi, modelare geospațială îmbunătățită și o conformitate sporită cu principiile FAIR.

1.1.0 – σημαντική αναδιοργάνωση της οντολογίας με ενισχυμένη σημασιολογική διαλειτουργικότητα, σημαντικό εμπλουτισμό του γράφου γνώσης των θαλάσσιων παρατηρητηρίων, ευρύτερη επαναχρησιμοποίηση κοινοτικών προτύπων και εξωτερικών αναγνωριστικών, βελτιωμένη γεωχωρική μοντελοποίηση και αυξημένη συμμόρφωση με τις αρχές FAIR.

1.1.0 – refonte majeure de l'ontologie avec une interopérabilité sémantique renforcée, un enrichissement important du graphe de connaissances des observatoires marins, une réutilisation accrue des standards communautaires et des identifiants externes, une modélisation géospatiale améliorée et une meilleure conformité aux principes FAIR.

provenance.value: The ontology was developed and maintained using Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 and RDFLib 7.6.0, version-controlled and published through GitHub. Versioning follows Semantic Versioning (SemVer) and commit history follows the Conventional Commits specification. Ontology metadata are reviewed and updated, and ontology statistics are recomputed for each release.

L'ontologie a été développée et maintenue à l'aide de Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 et RDFLib 7.6.0, versionnée et publiée via GitHub. La gestion des versions suit Semantic Versioning (SemVer) et l'historique des commits respecte la spécification Conventional Commits. Les métadonnées de l'ontologie sont vérifiées et mises à jour, et les statistiques de l'ontologie sont recalculées à chaque nouvelle version.

La ontología fue desarrollada y mantenida utilizando Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 y RDFLib 7.6.0, versionada y publicada mediante GitHub. El versionado sigue Semantic Versioning (SemVer) y el historial de commits cumple la especificación Conventional Commits. Los metadatos de la ontología se revisan y actualizan, y las estadísticas de la ontología se recalculan en cada nueva versión.

Ontologia a fost dezvoltată și întreținută utilizând Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 și RDFLib 7.6.0, gestionată prin controlul versiunilor și publicată prin GitHub. Versionarea urmează Semantic Versioning (SemVer), iar istoricul commit-urilor respectă specificația Conventional Commits. Metadatele ontologiei sunt revizuite și actualizate, iar statisticile ontologiei sunt recalculate pentru fiecare nouă versiune.

Ontologien ble utviklet og vedlikeholdt med Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 og RDFLib 7.6.0, versjonskontrollert og publisert gjennom GitHub. Versjoneringen følger Semantic Versioning (SemVer), og commit-historikken følger spesifikasjonen Conventional Commits. Ontologiens metadata blir gjennomgått og oppdatert, og ontologistatistikken blir beregnet på nytt for hver nye versjon.

Η οντολογία αναπτύχθηκε και συντηρείται με χρήση των Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 και RDFLib 7.6.0, τελεί υπό έλεγχο εκδόσεων και δημοσιεύεται μέσω GitHub. Η διαχείριση εκδόσεων ακολουθεί το Semantic Versioning (SemVer), ενώ το ιστορικό των commits συμμορφώνεται με την προδιαγραφή Conventional Commits. Τα μεταδεδομένα της οντολογίας ελέγχονται και ενημερώνονται, ενώ τα στατιστικά της οντολογίας επανυπολογίζονται σε κάθε νέα έκδοση.

A ontologia foi desenvolvida e mantida utilizando o Protégé 5.6.9, o VSCodium 1.121.03429 e o RDFLib 7.6.0, versionada e publicada através do GitHub. O versionamento segue o Semantic Versioning (SemVer) e o histórico de commits respeita a especificação Conventional Commits. Os metadados da ontologia são revistos e atualizados, e as estatísticas da ontologia são recalculadas a cada nova versão.

L'ontologia è stata sviluppata e mantenuta utilizzando Protégé 5.6.9, VSCodium 1.121.03429 e RDFLib 7.6.0, versionata e pubblicata tramite GitHub. Il versionamento segue Semantic Versioning (SemVer) e la cronologia dei commit rispetta la specifica Conventional Commits. I metadati dell'ontologia vengono verificati e aggiornati, e le statistiche dell'ontologia vengono ricalcolate a ogni nuova versione.

definition.value: Denne ontologien har som mål å beskrive undervannsobservatorier, særlig de som er tilknyttet European Multidisciplinary Seafloor and Water Column Observatories (EMSO), som har vært et europeisk forskningsinfrastrukturkonsortium (ERIC) siden 2016.

Questa ontologia ha lo scopo di descrivere gli osservatori sottomarini, in particolare quelli associati agli Osservatori multidisciplinari europei dei fondali marini e della colonna d'acqua (EMSO), che dal 2016 costituiscono un Consorzio europeo per le infrastrutture di ricerca (ERIC).

This ontology aims to describe underwater observatories, in particular those associated with the European Multidisciplinary Seafloor and Water Column Observatories (EMSO), which has been a European Research Infrastructure Consortium (ERIC) since 2016.

Cette ontologie vise à décrire les observatoires sous-marins, en particulier ceux associés au réseau européen d'observatoires multidisciplinaires des fonds marins et de la colonne d'eau (EMSO), qui constitue un consortium européen d'infrastructures de recherche (ERIC) depuis 2016.

Esta ontología tiene como objetivo describir los observatorios submarinos, en particular los asociados al Observatorio Multidisciplinar Europeo del Fondo Marino y la Columna de Agua (EMSO), que es un Consorcio Europeo de Infraestructuras de Investigación (ERIC) desde 2016.

Această ontologie are ca scop descrierea observatoarelor subacvatice, în special a celor asociate cu Observatoarele multidisciplinare europene ale fundului mării și coloanei de apă (EMSO), care constituie un consorțiu european de infrastructură de cercetare (ERIC) din 2016.

Η οντολογία αυτή έχει ως στόχο να περιγράψει τα υποβρύχια παρατηρητήρια, ιδίως εκείνα που συνδέονται με τα Ευρωπαϊκά Πολυεπιστημονικά Παρατηρητήρια Θαλάσσιου Βυθού και Υδροκολώνας (EMSO), τα οποία αποτελούν Ευρωπαϊκό Συνεταιρισμό Ερευνητικής Υποδομής (ERIC) από το 2016.

Esta ontologia visa descrever observatórios subaquáticos, em particular os associados ao Observatório Multidisciplinar Europeu do Fundo Marinho e da Coluna de Água (EMSO), que é um Consórcio Europeu de Infraestruturas de Investigação (ERIC) desde 2016.

ontologyPurpose.value: Beskrive strukturen og hovedkomponentene i marine observatorier for å forbedre datastyring, interoperabilitet og gjenbruk, spesielt i EMSO-forskningsinfrastrukturens kontekst.

Descrivere la struttura e i principali componenti degli osservatori marini per migliorare la gestione, l'interoperabilità e il riutilizzo dei dati, in particolare nel contesto dell'infrastruttura di ricerca EMSO.

Décrire la structure et les composants clés des observatoires marins afin d'améliorer la gestion, l'interopérabilité et la réutilisation des données, notamment dans le cadre de l'infrastructure de recherche EMSO.
Describe the structure and key components of marine observatories to improve data management, interoperability, and reuse, especially in the EMSO research infrastructure context.

Descrever a estrutura e os principais componentes dos observatórios marinhos para melhorar a gestão de dados, a interoperabilidade e a reutilização, especialmente no contexto da infraestrutura de investigação EMSO.

Περιγραφή της δομής και των βασικών στοιχείων των θαλάσσιων παρατηρητηρίων για τη βελτίωση της διαχείρισης δεδομένων, της διαλειτουργικότητας και της επαναχρησιμοποίησης, ιδιαίτερα στο πλαίσιο της υποδομής EMSO.

Describir la estructura y los componentes clave de los observatorios marinos para mejorar la gestión de datos, la interoperabilidad y la reutilización, especialmente en el contexto de la infraestructura de investigación EMSO.
Descrierea structurii și a componentelor cheie ale observatoarelor marine pentru a îmbunătăți gestionarea, interoperabilitatea și reutilizarea datelor, în special în contextul infrastructurii EMSO.

comment.no: CHEREEF-OBS er en serie oseanografiske observasjonskampanjer dedikert til langsiktig overvåking av økosystemer med kaldtvannskoraller i Lampaul-kløften.
comment.pt: CHEREEF-OBS é uma série de campanhas de observação oceanográfica dedicadas ao acompanhamento de longo prazo dos ecossistemas de corais de águas frias no canyon de Lampaul.
comment.el: CHEREEF-OBS είναι μια σειρά ωκεανογραφικών αποστολών παρατήρησης αφιερωμένων στη μακροχρόνια παρακολούθηση οικοσυστημάτων κοραλλιών ψυχρών υδάτων στο φαράγγι Lampaul.
comment.en: CHEREEF-OBS is a series of oceanographic observation campaigns dedicated to the long-term monitoring of cold-water coral ecosystems in the Lampaul Canyon.
comment.it: CHEREEF-OBS è una serie di campagne di osservazione oceanografica dedicate al monitoraggio a lungo termine degli ecosistemi di coralli di acque fredde nel canyon di Lampaul.
comment.fr: CHEREEF-OBS est une série de campagnes d’observation océanographique dédiées au suivi à long terme des écosystèmes de coraux d’eau froide dans le canyon de Lampaul.
comment.ro: CHEREEF-OBS este o serie de campanii de observație oceanografică dedicate monitorizării pe termen lung a ecosistemelor de corali de apă rece din canionul Lampaul.

comment.no: Svartehavet er et av de største regionale havene på det eurasiske kontinentet og er unikt med hensyn til mange av sine geografiske, geologiske, biologiske, hydrografiske og samfunnspolitiske egenskaper. Anoksiske forhold på store dyp, problemer knyttet til invasive arter og store sedimentmengder som tilføres systemet gjør dette området spesielt og krever langsiktige observasjonsstasjoner. Svartehavet ligger i et geologisk komplekst område hvor tre store tektoniske plater (den eurasiske, anatoliske og arabiske platen) møtes. Geofarer som jordskjelv, undersjøiske skred og forskyvninger langs aktive forkastninger forekommer og kan utløse tsunamier sammen med ekstreme meteorologiske hendelser.
comment.pt: O Mar Negro é um dos maiores mares regionais do continente euroasiático e é único em muitas das suas características geográficas, geológicas, biológicas, hidrográficas e sociopolíticas. As condições anóxicas em profundidade, os problemas com espécies invasoras e as elevadas cargas sedimentares transportadas para o sistema tornam esta área particularmente complexa e exigem estações de observação de longo prazo. O Mar Negro localiza-se numa região geologicamente complexa onde interagem três grandes placas tectónicas (Euroasiática, Anatólia e Arábica). Estão presentes riscos geológicos, como sismos, deslizamentos submarinos e deslocamentos ao longo de falhas ativas, que podem desencadear tsunamis juntamente com fenómenos meteorológicos extremos.
comment.el: Η Μαύρη Θάλασσα είναι μία από τις μεγαλύτερες περιφερειακές θάλασσες της ευρασιατικής ηπείρου και μοναδική σε πολλά από τα γεωγραφικά, γεωλογικά, βιολογικά, υδρογραφικά και κοινωνικοπολιτικά χαρακτηριστικά της. Οι ανοξικές συνθήκες στα μεγάλα βάθη, τα προβλήματα με τα χωροκατακτητικά είδη και τα υψηλά φορτία ιζημάτων που μεταφέρονται στο σύστημα δημιουργούν ιδιαίτερες προκλήσεις που απαιτούν μακροχρόνιους σταθμούς παρατήρησης. Η Μαύρη Θάλασσα βρίσκεται σε μια γεωλογικά σύνθετη περιοχή, όπου αλληλεπιδρούν τρεις μεγάλες τεκτονικές πλάκες (Ευρασιατική, Ανατολική και Αραβική). Γεωκίνδυνοι όπως σεισμοί, υποθαλάσσιες κατολισθήσεις και μετατοπίσεις κατά μήκος ενεργών ρηγμάτων είναι παρόντες και μπορούν να προκαλέσουν τσουνάμι, σε συνδυασμό με ακραία μετεωρολογικά φαινόμενα.
comment.en: The Black Sea is one of the largest regional seas of the Eurasian continent and unique in many of its geographical, geological, biological, hydrographical and socio-political characteristics. With anoxic conditions in the deep, problems with invasive species and high sediment loads delivered to the system, this area has unique problems requiring long-term stations. The Black Sea is located in a geological complex area, where three major tectonic plates (Eurasian, Anatolian, Arabian) interact. Geo hazards, such as earthquakes, submarine landslides, displacement along active faults, are present and are possible triggers of tsunami, together with extreme meteorological events.
comment.it: Il Mar Nero è uno dei più grandi mari regionali del continente eurasiatico ed è unico per molte delle sue caratteristiche geografiche, geologiche, biologiche, idrografiche e socio-politiche. Le condizioni anossiche nelle profondità, i problemi legati alle specie invasive e gli elevati carichi sedimentari trasportati nel sistema rendono quest’area particolarmente complessa e richiedono stazioni di osservazione a lungo termine. Il Mar Nero si trova in una regione geologicamente complessa dove interagiscono tre grandi placche tettoniche (eurasiatica, anatolica e arabica). Sono presenti rischi geologici come terremoti, frane sottomarine e spostamenti lungo faglie attive, che possono innescare tsunami insieme a eventi meteorologici estremi.
comment.fr: La mer Noire est l’une des plus grandes mers régionales du continent eurasiatique et présente des caractéristiques géographiques, géologiques, biologiques, hydrographiques et sociopolitiques uniques. Les conditions anoxiques en profondeur, les problèmes liés aux espèces invasives et les fortes charges sédimentaires apportées au système confèrent à cette zone des problématiques spécifiques nécessitant des stations d’observation à long terme. La mer Noire est située dans une région géologiquement complexe où interagissent trois grandes plaques tectoniques (eurasienne, anatolienne et arabique). Des aléas géologiques tels que les séismes, les glissements sous-marins et les déplacements le long de failles actives sont présents et peuvent déclencher des tsunamis, en combinaison avec des événements météorologiques extrêmes.
comment.ro: Marea Neagră este una dintre cele mai mari mări regionale ale continentului eurasiatic și este unică prin numeroasele sale caracteristici geografice, geologice, biologice, hidrografice și socio-politice. Condițiile anoxice din adâncuri, problemele legate de speciile invazive și încărcăturile mari de sedimente transportate în sistem conferă acestei zone provocări specifice care necesită stații de observație pe termen lung. Marea Neagră este situată într-o regiune geologică complexă unde interacționează trei mari plăci tectonice (eurasiatică, anatoliană și arabică). Sunt prezente riscuri geologice precum cutremurele, alunecările submarine și deplasările de-a lungul falilor active, care pot declanșa tsunamiuri împreună cu fenomene meteorologice extreme.
comment.es: El Mar Negro es uno de los mares regionales más grandes del continente euroasiático y es único por muchas de sus características geográficas, geológicas, biológicas, hidrográficas y sociopolíticas. Las condiciones anóxicas en profundidad, los problemas relacionados con especies invasoras y las elevadas cargas de sedimentos transportadas al sistema hacen que esta zona presente desafíos particulares que requieren estaciones de observación a largo plazo. El Mar Negro se encuentra en una región geológicamente compleja donde interactúan tres grandes placas tectónicas (Euroasiática, Anatolia y Arábiga). Existen riesgos geológicos como terremotos, deslizamientos submarinos y desplazamientos a lo largo de fallas activas, que pueden desencadenar tsunamis junto con fenómenos meteorológicos extremos.

definition.value: A bundle is a named set of provenance descriptions, and is itself an Entity, so allowing provenance of provenance to be expressed.

comment.en: Note that there are kinds of bundles (e.g. handwritten letters, audio recordings, etc.) that are not expressed in PROV-O, but can be still be described by PROV-O.

description.en:
EMSO-France Research Infrastructure, included in the MESR roadmap, coordinates French initiatives on underwater observatories within the European programme and promotes their openness to a wide range of teams and disciplines. France’s involvement is driven by its expertise in data management, technological innovation, and the strategic selection of observatory deployment sites:

        the Azores site on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, within Portugal’s EEZ,
        the Ligurian Sea site, east on the Nice slope and west in the deep continental margin area, linked to the IN2P3 neutrino telescope,
        the Marmara Sea site along the North Anatolian Fault,
        the Iroise Sea test site, initially located offshore Molène, currently being relocated to Brest harbour.
description.fr:
L’infrastructure de recherche EMSO-France, inscrite dans la feuille de route du MESR, coordonne les initiatives françaises sur les observatoires sous-marins du programme européen et favorise leur ouverture à un large éventail d’équipes et de disciplines. L’engagement de la France repose sur son expertise en gestion de données, en innovation technologique et sur le choix stratégique des sites d’implantation des observatoires :

        le site des Açores sur la dorsale médio-atlantique, dans la ZEE du Portugal,
        le site de la mer Ligure, à l’est sur la pente de Nice et à l’ouest dans la zone profonde du talus continental, en lien avec le télescope à neutrinos de l’IN2P3,
        le site de la mer de Marmara sur la faille nord-anatolienne,
        le site d’essai en mer d’Iroise, initialement au large de Molène, en cours de relocalisation en rade de Brest.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Invalidation provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasInvalidatedBy relation from an invalidated prov:Entity to the prov:Activity that invalidated it. description.pt: A região do Golfo de Cádis é extremamente importante para os riscos geológicos. Foi o local do devastador terramoto e tsunami de 1755 que afetou a Europa. A convergência das placas tectónicas africana e euroasiática torna esta região altamente ativa do ponto de vista sísmico e vulcânico. A Margem Ibérica é também uma região oceanográfica fundamental onde ocorre a troca de águas atlânticas e mediterrânicas, influenciando a circulação meridional do Atlântico (AMOC). Representa a parte mais setentrional do Sistema de Afloramento das Canárias (CCUS), caracterizado por forte afloramento costeiro e intensa dinâmica de mesoescala. Estas condições geológicas e oceanográficas favorecem ecossistemas bentónicos altamente diversos e desempenham um papel importante na distribuição de mamíferos marinhos e espécies de peixes.
description.en: The Gulf of Cadiz area is highly important for geo-hazards. It was the location of the devastating 1755 earthquake and tsunami that affected Europe. The convergence of the African and Eurasian tectonic plates makes this region seismically and volcanically active. The Iberian Margin is also a key oceanographic region where Atlantic and Mediterranean waters exchange, influencing the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC). It is the northernmost part of the Canary Current Upwelling System (CCUS), characterised by strong upwelling and mesoscale ocean dynamics. These geological and oceanographic conditions support highly diverse benthic ecosystems and play an important role in the distribution of marine mammals and fish species.
description.fr: La région du golfe de Cadix est particulièrement importante pour les aléas géologiques. Elle a été le siège du séisme et du tsunami dévastateurs de 1755 ayant affecté l’Europe. La convergence des plaques tectoniques africaine et eurasienne rend cette région fortement active sur les plans sismique et volcanique. La marge ibérique constitue également une zone océanographique clé où les eaux atlantiques et méditerranéennes s’échangent, influençant la circulation méridienne de retournement atlantique (AMOC). Elle représente la partie la plus septentrionale du système d’upwelling des Canaries (CCUS), caractérisé par des remontées d’eaux profondes et une forte dynamique méso-échelle. Ces conditions géologiques et océanographiques favorisent une grande diversité des communautés benthiques ainsi qu’un rôle majeur dans la répartition de nombreuses espèces de mammifères marins et de poissons.

comment.no:
Den regionale infrastrukturen Nordic Seas omfatter 5 seksjoner med havglidere, 4 fortøyningsstasjoner og ett multi-array observatorium. Den kombinerer eksisterende overvåkingskomponenter, som utvides, med nye installasjoner, med mål om å forbedre forståelsen av Nordic Seas sin rolle i det globale klimasystemet. Forskningen fokuserer på:
                             
                             Vanntransport, sirkulasjon og egenskaper til vannmassene i Nordic Seas  
                             Biogeokjemi under overflaten • Metanutslipp fra havbunnen  
                             Variabilitet i fronter mellom polare og atlantiske vannmasser  
                             Geofysisk, oseanografisk og økologisk karakterisering av hydrotermale kilder  
                             
                             Aktiviteten vises på kartet med gliderbaner (røde linjer), fortøyninger (hvite sirkler) og observatorium (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             EMSO-fagområder: fysisk oseanografi, biogeokjemi, marin økologi (planlagt)
comment.pt:
A infraestrutura regional Nordic Seas inclui 5 secções de gliders oceânicos, 4 estações de amarração e um observatório multi-array. Combina componentes de monitorização existentes, ampliados, com novas instalações, com o objetivo de melhorar a compreensão do papel dos Nordic Seas no sistema climático global. A investigação centra-se em:
                             
                             Transporte de água, circulação e propriedades das massas de água  
                             Biogeoquímica subsuperficial • Libertação de metano do fundo marinho  
                             Variabilidade das frentes entre águas polares e atlânticas  
                             Caracterização geofísica, oceanográfica e ecológica de fontes hidrotermais  
                             
                             A atividade é apresentada no mapa com transectos (linhas vermelhas), amarrações (círculos brancos) e observatório (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             Disciplinas EMSO: oceanografia física, biogeoquímica, ecologia marinha (planeada)
comment.el:
Οι περιφερειακές εγκαταστάσεις Nordic Seas περιλαμβάνουν 5 διαδρομές ωκεάνιων ανεμοπτερίων, 4 σταθμούς αγκυροβολημένων οργάνων και ένα πολυστοιχειακό παρατηρητήριο. Η εγκατάσταση αποτελεί συνδυασμό υφιστάμενων στοιχείων παρακολούθησης, τα οποία επεκτείνονται, και νέων υποδομών, με κύριο στόχο τη βελτίωση της κατανόησης του ρόλου των Nordic Seas στο παγκόσμιο κλιματικό σύστημα. Ειδικότερα, η διεπιστημονική έρευνα που διεξάγεται στην περιφερειακή εγκατάσταση Nordic Seas εστιάζει στα εξής:
                             
                             Μεταφορά υδάτων, κυκλοφορία και ιδιότητες των υδάτινων μαζών των Nordic Seas  
                             Υποθαλάσσια βιογεωχημεία • Εκπομπές μεθανίου από τον θαλάσσιο πυθμένα  
                             Μεταβλητότητα των μετώπων μεταξύ πολικών και ατλαντικών υδάτων  
                             Γεωφυσικός, ωκεανογραφικός και οικολογικός χαρακτηρισμός υδροθερμικού αναβλύσματος  
                             
                             Η δραστηριότητα της περιφερειακής εγκατάστασης Nordic Seas παρουσιάζεται στον χάρτη, όπου οι διαδρομές των ανεμοπτερίων απεικονίζονται με κόκκινες γραμμές και αριθμούς, οι σταθμοί αγκυροβολημένων οργάνων με λευκούς κύκλους (Svinøy, Station M, South Cape, Fram Strait), και το πολυστοιχειακό παρατηρητήριο με λευκό κύκλο (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             Επιστημονικοί τομείς EMSO: φυσική ωκεανογραφία, βιογεωχημεία, θαλάσσια οικολογία (υπό σχεδιασμό)
comment.en:
The Nordic Seas regional facility comprises 5 ocean glider sections, 4 mooring sites, and one multi-array observatory. The facility combines existing monitoring components, which are expanded, with new installations, with the main aim of improving understanding of the role of the Nordic Seas in the global climate system. In particular, the multidisciplinary research conducted at the Nordic Seas regional facility focuses on:
                             
                             Water transport, circulation and water mass properties of the Nordic Seas  
                             Sub-surface biogeochemistry • Methane release from the seafloor  
                             Front variability between Polar and Atlantic waters  
                             Geophysical, oceanographic and ecological characterization of a hydrothermal vent  
                             
                             The activity of the Nordic Seas regional facility is illustrated on the map, where ocean glider transects are shown as red lines and numbers, mooring sites as white circles (Svinøy, Station M, South Cape, Fram Strait), and the multi-array observatory as a white circle (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             EMSO scientific disciplines: physical oceanography, biogeochemistry, marine ecology (planned)
comment.it:
L’infrastruttura regionale Nordic Seas comprende 5 sezioni di glider oceanici, 4 siti di ormeggio e un osservatorio multi-array. Combina componenti di monitoraggio esistenti, ampliati, con nuove installazioni, con l’obiettivo di migliorare la comprensione del ruolo dei Nordic Seas nel sistema climatico globale. In particolare, la ricerca multidisciplinare si concentra su:
                             
                             Trasporto dell’acqua, circolazione e proprietà delle masse d’acqua dei Nordic Seas  
                             Biogeochimica sub-superficiale • Rilascio di metano dal fondale  
                             Variabilità dei fronti tra acque polari e atlantiche  
                             Caratterizzazione geofisica, oceanografica ed ecologica di una sorgente idrotermale  
                             
                             L’attività è illustrata nella mappa: transect dei glider (linee rosse), ormeggi (cerchi bianchi) e osservatorio multi-array (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             Discipline EMSO: oceanografia fisica, biogeochimica, ecologia marina (in pianificazione)
comment.fr:
L’infrastructure régionale Nordic Seas comprend 5 sections de planeurs océaniques, 4 sites de mouillages et un observatoire multi-réseaux. Elle combine des dispositifs de suivi existants, étendus, avec de nouvelles installations, afin d’améliorer la compréhension du rôle des Nordic Seas dans le système climatique global. Les recherches pluridisciplinaires portent notamment sur :
                             
                             Transport de l’eau, circulation et propriétés des masses d’eau des Nordic Seas  
                             Biogéochimie sous-surface • Émissions de méthane depuis le fond marin  
                             Variabilité des fronts entre eaux polaires et atlantiques  
                             Caractérisation géophysique, océanographique et écologique d’une source hydrothermale  
                             
                             L’activité est présentée sur la carte : transects de planeurs (lignes rouges), mouillages (cercles blancs : Svinøy, Station M, South Cape, Fram Strait) et observatoire multi-réseaux (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             Disciplines EMSO : océanographie physique, biogéochimie, écologie marine (en cours de développement)
comment.ro:
Infrastructura regională Nordic Seas include 5 secțiuni de glidere oceanice, 4 stații de ancorare și un observator multi-array. Aceasta combină componente de monitorizare existente, extinse, cu noi instalații, având ca obiectiv îmbunătățirea înțelegerii rolului Nordic Seas în sistemul climatic global. Cercetarea se concentrează pe:
                             
                             Transportul apei, circulația și proprietățile maselor de apă  
                             Biogeochimia sub-suprafață • Emisia de metan de pe fundul mării  
                             Variabilitatea fronturilor între ape polare și atlantice  
                             Caracterizarea geofizică, oceanografică și ecologică a unei surse hidrotermale  
                             
                             Activitatea este ilustrată pe hartă: glidere (linii roșii), ancoraje (cercuri albe) și observatorul (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             Domenii EMSO: oceanografie fizică, biogeochimie, ecologie marină (planificată)
comment.es:
La infraestructura regional Nordic Seas comprende 5 secciones de planeadores oceánicos, 4 estaciones de fondeo y un observatorio multi-array. Combina componentes de monitorización existentes, ampliados, con nuevas instalaciones, con el objetivo principal de mejorar la comprensión del papel de los Nordic Seas en el sistema climático global. En particular, la investigación multidisciplinar se centra en:
                             
                             Transporte de agua, circulación y propiedades de las masas de agua de los Nordic Seas  
                             Biogeoquímica subsuperficial • Emisiones de metano desde el fondo marino  
                             Variabilidad de los frentes entre aguas polares y atlánticas  
                             Caracterización geofísica, oceanográfica y ecológica de una fuente hidrotermal  
                             
                             La actividad se muestra en el mapa, donde los transectos de planeadores se indican con líneas rojas y números, los fondeos con círculos blancos (Svinøy, Station M, South Cape, Fram Strait) y el observatorio multi-array con un círculo blanco (EMSO-Mohn).
                             
                             Disciplinas científicas EMSO: oceanografía física, biogeoquímica, ecología marina (planificada)

comment.no: Svartehavet er et av de største regionale havene på det eurasiske kontinentet og er unikt med hensyn til mange av sine geografiske, geologiske, biologiske, hydrografiske og samfunnspolitiske egenskaper. Anoksiske forhold på store dyp, problemer knyttet til invasive arter og store sedimentmengder som tilføres systemet gjør dette området spesielt og krever langsiktige observasjonsstasjoner. Svartehavet ligger i et geologisk komplekst område hvor tre store tektoniske plater (den eurasiske, anatoliske og arabiske platen) møtes. Geofarer som jordskjelv, undersjøiske skred og forskyvninger langs aktive forkastninger forekommer og kan utløse tsunamier sammen med ekstreme meteorologiske hendelser.
comment.pt: O Mar Negro é um dos maiores mares regionais do continente euroasiático e é único em muitas das suas características geográficas, geológicas, biológicas, hidrográficas e sociopolíticas. As condições anóxicas em profundidade, os problemas com espécies invasoras e as elevadas cargas sedimentares transportadas para o sistema tornam esta área particularmente complexa e exigem estações de observação de longo prazo. O Mar Negro localiza-se numa região geologicamente complexa onde interagem três grandes placas tectónicas (Euroasiática, Anatólia e Arábica). Estão presentes riscos geológicos, como sismos, deslizamentos submarinos e deslocamentos ao longo de falhas ativas, que podem desencadear tsunamis juntamente com fenómenos meteorológicos extremos.
comment.el: Η Μαύρη Θάλασσα είναι μία από τις μεγαλύτερες περιφερειακές θάλασσες της ευρασιατικής ηπείρου και μοναδική σε πολλά από τα γεωγραφικά, γεωλογικά, βιολογικά, υδρογραφικά και κοινωνικοπολιτικά χαρακτηριστικά της. Οι ανοξικές συνθήκες στα μεγάλα βάθη, τα προβλήματα με τα χωροκατακτητικά είδη και τα υψηλά φορτία ιζημάτων που μεταφέρονται στο σύστημα δημιουργούν ιδιαίτερες προκλήσεις που απαιτούν μακροχρόνιους σταθμούς παρατήρησης. Η Μαύρη Θάλασσα βρίσκεται σε μια γεωλογικά σύνθετη περιοχή, όπου αλληλεπιδρούν τρεις μεγάλες τεκτονικές πλάκες (Ευρασιατική, Ανατολική και Αραβική). Γεωκίνδυνοι όπως σεισμοί, υποθαλάσσιες κατολισθήσεις και μετατοπίσεις κατά μήκος ενεργών ρηγμάτων είναι παρόντες και μπορούν να προκαλέσουν τσουνάμι, σε συνδυασμό με ακραία μετεωρολογικά φαινόμενα.
comment.en: The Black Sea is one of the largest regional seas of the Eurasian continent and unique in many of its geographical, geological, biological, hydrographical and socio-political characteristics. With anoxic conditions in the deep, problems with invasive species and high sediment loads delivered to the system, this area has unique problems requiring long-term stations. The Black Sea is located in a geological complex area, where three major tectonic plates (Eurasian, Anatolian, Arabian) interact. Geo hazards, such as earthquakes, submarine landslides, displacement along active faults, are present and are possible triggers of tsunami, together with extreme meteorological events.
comment.it: Il Mar Nero è uno dei più grandi mari regionali del continente eurasiatico ed è unico per molte delle sue caratteristiche geografiche, geologiche, biologiche, idrografiche e socio-politiche. Le condizioni anossiche nelle profondità, i problemi legati alle specie invasive e gli elevati carichi sedimentari trasportati nel sistema rendono quest’area particolarmente complessa e richiedono stazioni di osservazione a lungo termine. Il Mar Nero si trova in una regione geologicamente complessa dove interagiscono tre grandi placche tettoniche (eurasiatica, anatolica e arabica). Sono presenti rischi geologici come terremoti, frane sottomarine e spostamenti lungo faglie attive, che possono innescare tsunami insieme a eventi meteorologici estremi.
comment.fr: La mer Noire est l’une des plus grandes mers régionales du continent eurasiatique et présente des caractéristiques géographiques, géologiques, biologiques, hydrographiques et sociopolitiques uniques. Les conditions anoxiques en profondeur, les problèmes liés aux espèces invasives et les fortes charges sédimentaires apportées au système confèrent à cette zone des problématiques spécifiques nécessitant des stations d’observation à long terme. La mer Noire est située dans une région géologiquement complexe où interagissent trois grandes plaques tectoniques (eurasienne, anatolienne et arabique). Des aléas géologiques tels que les séismes, les glissements sous-marins et les déplacements le long de failles actives sont présents et peuvent déclencher des tsunamis, en combinaison avec des événements météorologiques extrêmes.
comment.ro: Marea Neagră este una dintre cele mai mari mări regionale ale continentului eurasiatic și este unică prin numeroasele sale caracteristici geografice, geologice, biologice, hidrografice și socio-politice. Condițiile anoxice din adâncuri, problemele legate de speciile invazive și încărcăturile mari de sedimente transportate în sistem conferă acestei zone provocări specifice care necesită stații de observație pe termen lung. Marea Neagră este situată într-o regiune geologică complexă unde interacționează trei mari plăci tectonice (eurasiatică, anatoliană și arabică). Sunt prezente riscuri geologice precum cutremurele, alunecările submarine și deplasările de-a lungul falilor active, care pot declanșa tsunamiuri împreună cu fenomene meteorologice extreme.
comment.es: El Mar Negro es uno de los mares regionales más grandes del continente euroasiático y es único por muchas de sus características geográficas, geológicas, biológicas, hidrográficas y sociopolíticas. Las condiciones anóxicas en profundidad, los problemas relacionados con especies invasoras y las elevadas cargas de sedimentos transportadas al sistema hacen que esta zona presente desafíos particulares que requieren estaciones de observación a largo plazo. El Mar Negro se encuentra en una región geológicamente compleja donde interactúan tres grandes placas tectónicas (Euroasiática, Anatolia y Arábiga). Existen riesgos geológicos como terremotos, deslizamientos submarinos y desplazamientos a lo largo de fallas activas, que pueden desencadenar tsunamis junto con fenómenos meteorológicos extremos.

description.en: This Regional Facility covers an active seismic marine region characterized by a narrow and steep continental slope, alpine reliefs, submarine canyons, slope instability, strong atmospheric inputs, and significant implications for seismic hazard, tsunami risk, and marine biomass production.
description.it: Questa infrastruttura regionale copre una regione marina sismicamente attiva caratterizzata da una scarpata continentale stretta e ripida, rilievi alpini, canyon sottomarini, instabilità dei versanti, forti influenze atmosferiche e importanti implicazioni per il rischio sismico, gli tsunami e la produzione di biomassa marina.
description.fr: Cette installation régionale couvre une zone marine sismiquement active caractérisée par une pente continentale étroite et abrupte, des reliefs alpins, des canyons sous-marins, une instabilité des pentes, de fortes influences atmosphériques et des enjeux importants en matière de risques sismiques, de tsunamis et de production de biomasse marine.

definition.value: A quotation is the repeat of (some or all of) an entity, such as text or image, by someone who may or may not be its original author. Quotation is a particular case of derivation.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Quotation provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasQuotedFrom relation from some taken prov:Entity from an earlier, larger prov:Entity. For example, :here_is_looking_at_you_kid prov:wasQuotedFrom :casablanca_script; prov:qualifiedQuotation [ a prov:Quotation; prov:entity :casablanca_script; :foo :bar ].

A primary source for a topic refers to something produced by some agent with direct experience and knowledge about the topic, at the time of the topic's study, without benefit from hindsight.

Because of the directness of primary sources, they 'speak for themselves' in ways that cannot be captured through the filter of secondary sources. As such, it is important for secondary sources to reference those primary sources from which they were derived, so that their reliability can be investigated.

A primary source relation is a particular case of derivation of secondary materials from their primary sources. It is recognized that the determination of primary sources can be up to interpretation, and should be done according to conventions accepted within the application's domain.

comment.en: An instance of prov:PrimarySource provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:hadPrimarySource relation from some secondary prov:Entity to an earlier, primary prov:Entity. For example, :blog prov:hadPrimarySource :newsArticle; prov:qualifiedPrimarySource [ a prov:PrimarySource; prov:entity :newsArticle; :foo :bar ] .

definition.value: A revision is a derivation for which the resulting entity is a revised version of some original. The implication here is that the resulting entity contains substantial content from the original. Revision is a particular case of derivation.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Revision provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasRevisionOf relation from some newer prov:Entity to an earlier prov:Entity. For example, :draft_2 prov:wasRevisionOf :draft_1; prov:qualifiedRevision [ a prov:Revision; prov:entity :draft_1; :foo :bar ].

definition.value: End is when an activity is deemed to have been ended by an entity, known as trigger. The activity no longer exists after its end. Any usage, generation, or invalidation involving an activity precedes the activity's end. An end may refer to a trigger entity that terminated the activity, or to an activity, known as ender that generated the trigger.

comment.en: An instance of prov:End provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasEndedBy relation from some ended prov:Activity to an prov:Entity that ended it. For example, :ball_game prov:wasEndedBy :buzzer; prov:qualifiedEnd [ a prov:End; prov:entity :buzzer; :foo :bar; prov:atTime '2012-03-09T08:05:08-05:00'^^xsd:dateTime ].

comment.no: Representerer et rektangulært geografisk område definert av nordlige, sørlige, østlige og vestlige koordinatgrenser. Dette konseptet er tilpasset ISO 19115-3 og interoperabelt med GeoSPARQL-geometrier.
comment.pt: Representa uma área geográfica retangular definida por limites de coordenadas norte, sul, este e oeste. Este conceito está alinhado com a ISO 19115-3 e interoperável com geometrias GeoSPARQL.
comment.el: Αναπαριστά μια ορθογώνια γεωγραφική περιοχή που ορίζεται από βόρεια, νότια, ανατολικά και δυτικά όρια συντεταγμένων. Η έννοια αυτή είναι ευθυγραμμισμένη με το ISO 19115-3 και διαλειτουργική με τις γεωμετρίες GeoSPARQL.
comment.en: Represents a rectangular geographic area defined by northern, southern, eastern and western coordinate boundaries. This concept is aligned with ISO 19115-3 and interoperable with GeoSPARQL geometries.
comment.it: Rappresenta un'area geografica rettangolare definita da limiti di coordinate nord, sud, est e ovest. Questo concetto è allineato con ISO 19115-3 ed è interoperabile con le geometrie GeoSPARQL.
comment.fr: Représente une zone géographique rectangulaire définie par des limites de coordonnées nord, sud, est et ouest. Ce concept est aligné sur l’ISO 19115-3 et interopérable avec les géométries GeoSPARQL.
comment.ro: Reprezintă o zonă geografică dreptunghiulară definită prin limite de coordonate nordice, sudice, estice și vestice. Acest concept este aliniat cu ISO 19115-3 și interoperabil cu geometriile GeoSPARQL.
comment.es: Representa un área geográfica rectangular definida por límites de coordenadas norte, sur, este y oeste. Este concepto está alineado con ISO 19115-3 e interoperable con las geometrías GeoSPARQL.

description.en: RDF dataset describing marine observatories structured by the Observatories of the Seas Ontology.

title.value: Observatories of the Seas Ontology dataset

definition.value: The PROV data model is implicitly based on a notion of instantaneous events (or just events), that mark transitions in the world. Events include generation, usage, or invalidation of entities, as well as starting or ending of activities. This notion of event is not first-class in the data model, but it is useful for explaining its other concepts and its semantics.

comment.en: An instantaneous event, or event for short, happens in the world and marks a change in the world, in its activities and in its entities. The term 'event' is commonly used in process algebra with a similar meaning. Events represent communications or interactions; they are assumed to be atomic and instantaneous.

editorsDefinition.value: ActivitiyInfluence is the capacity of an activity to have an effect on the character, development, or behavior of another by means of generation, invalidation, communication, or other.

comment.en: ActivityInfluence provides additional descriptions of an Activity's binary influence upon any other kind of resource. Instances of ActivityInfluence use the prov:activity property to cite the influencing Activity.

comment.no: En strukturert vitenskapelig aktivitet som har som mål å produsere ny kunnskap, data eller forståelse innenfor et definert omfang og tidsrom.
comment.pt: Uma atividade científica estruturada concebida para produzir novo conhecimento, dados ou compreensão dentro de um âmbito e duração definidos.

definition.value: The following definition for RI from Article 2 (6) of the Regulation (EU) No 1291/2013 of 11 December 2013: `Establishing Horizon 2020 - the Framework Programme for Research and Innovation (2014-2020)` applies: “RI are facilities, resources and services that are used by the research communities to conduct research and foster innovation in their fields. They include: major scientific equipment (or sets of instruments), knowledge-based resources such as collections, archives and scientific data, e-infrastructures, such as data and computing systems and communication networks and any other tools that are essential to achieve excellence in research and innovation.” Accordingly, RI are implemented along different organisational models, including central sources and laboratories for experiments and measurement sessions, coordination and management of geographically distributed observatories or laboratories, remotely accessible resources for computing, data banks, physical sample repositories, surveys and longitudinal studies.

description.en:
EMSO-France Research Infrastructure, included in the MESR roadmap, coordinates French initiatives on underwater observatories within the European programme and promotes their openness to a wide range of teams and disciplines. France’s involvement is driven by its expertise in data management, technological innovation, and the strategic selection of observatory deployment sites:

        the Azores site on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, within Portugal’s EEZ,
        the Ligurian Sea site, east on the Nice slope and west in the deep continental margin area, linked to the IN2P3 neutrino telescope,
        the Marmara Sea site along the North Anatolian Fault,
        the Iroise Sea test site, initially located offshore Molène, currently being relocated to Brest harbour.
description.fr:
L’infrastructure de recherche EMSO-France, inscrite dans la feuille de route du MESR, coordonne les initiatives françaises sur les observatoires sous-marins du programme européen et favorise leur ouverture à un large éventail d’équipes et de disciplines. L’engagement de la France repose sur son expertise en gestion de données, en innovation technologique et sur le choix stratégique des sites d’implantation des observatoires :

        le site des Açores sur la dorsale médio-atlantique, dans la ZEE du Portugal,
        le site de la mer Ligure, à l’est sur la pente de Nice et à l’ouest dans la zone profonde du talus continental, en lien avec le télescope à neutrinos de l’IN2P3,
        le site de la mer de Marmara sur la faille nord-anatolienne,
        le site d’essai en mer d’Iroise, initialement au large de Molène, en cours de relocalisation en rade de Brest.

definition.value: Start is when an activity is deemed to have been started by an entity, known as trigger. The activity did not exist before its start. Any usage, generation, or invalidation involving an activity follows the activity's start. A start may refer to a trigger entity that set off the activity, or to an activity, known as starter, that generated the trigger.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Start provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasStartedBy relation from some started prov:Activity to an prov:Entity that started it. For example, :foot_race prov:wasStartedBy :bang; prov:qualifiedStart [ a prov:Start; prov:entity :bang; :foo :bar; prov:atTime '2012-03-09T08:05:08-05:00'^^xsd:dateTime ] .

definition.value:
Attribution is the ascribing of an entity to an agent.

When an entity e is attributed to agent ag, entity e was generated by some unspecified activity that in turn was associated to agent ag. Thus, this relation is useful when the activity is not known, or irrelevant.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Attribution provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasAttributedTo relation from an prov:Entity to some prov:Agent that had some responsible for it. For example, :cake prov:wasAttributedTo :baker; prov:qualifiedAttribution [ a prov:Attribution; prov:entity :baker; :foo :bar ].

definition.value: A plan is an entity that represents a set of actions or steps intended by one or more agents to achieve some goals.

comment.en: There exist no prescriptive requirement on the nature of plans, their representation, the actions or steps they consist of, or their intended goals. Since plans may evolve over time, it may become necessary to track their provenance, so plans themselves are entities. Representing the plan explicitly in the provenance can be useful for various tasks: for example, to validate the execution as represented in the provenance record, to manage expectation failures, or to provide explanations.

definition.value: Uno strumento software utilizzato per valutare il livello di conformità FAIR degli artefatti semantici.

Ένα εργαλείο λογισμικού που χρησιμοποιείται για την αξιολόγηση του επιπέδου FAIR σημασιολογικών τεχνουργημάτων.

A software tool used to assess the FAIRness of semantic artefacts.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) este o metodologie și o aplicație web de evaluare automată a FAIRness, bazate pe metadate, pentru ontologii și artefacte semantice. Evaluează artefactele semantice folosind 61 de întrebări de evaluare derivate din metodologia O'FAIRe și produce scoruri FAIR aliniate la principiile FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) er en metadatabasert metodikk og webapplikasjon for automatisk vurdering av FAIRness for ontologier og semantiske artefakter. Den evaluerer semantiske artefakter ved hjelp av 61 vurderingsspørsmål basert på O'FAIRe-metodikken og produserer FAIR-poeng i samsvar med FAIR-prinsippene.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) est une méthodologie et une application web d’évaluation automatique de la FAIRness, fondées sur les métadonnées, pour les ontologies et les artefacts sémantiques. Elle évalue les artefacts sémantiques à l’aide de 61 questions d’évaluation issues de la méthodologie O'FAIRe et produit des scores FAIR conformes aux principes FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) è una metodologia e un'applicazione web per la valutazione automatica della FAIRness, basata sui metadati, per ontologie e artefatti semantici. Valuta gli artefatti semantici mediante 61 domande di valutazione derivate dalla metodologia O'FAIRe e produce punteggi FAIR conformi ai principi FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) é uma metodologia e uma aplicação web de avaliação automática da FAIRness, baseada em metadados, para ontologias e artefactos semânticos. Avalia os artefactos semânticos utilizando 61 questões de avaliação derivadas da metodologia O'FAIRe e produz pontuações FAIR alinhadas com os princípios FAIR.

Το Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) είναι μια μεθοδολογία και διαδικτυακή εφαρμογή αυτόματης αξιολόγησης της FAIRness, βασισμένη σε μεταδεδομένα, για οντολογίες και σημασιολογικά τεχνουργήματα. Αξιολογεί τα σημασιολογικά τεχνουργήματα χρησιμοποιώντας 61 ερωτήσεις αξιολόγησης που προέρχονται από τη μεθοδολογία O'FAIRe και παράγει βαθμολογίες FAIR ευθυγραμμισμένες με τις αρχές FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) es una metodología y una aplicación web de evaluación automática de la FAIRness, basadas en metadatos, para ontologías y artefactos semánticos. Evalúa los artefactos semánticos mediante 61 preguntas de evaluación derivadas de la metodología O'FAIRe y genera puntuaciones FAIR alineadas con los principios FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) is a metadata-based automatic FAIRness assessment methodology and web application for ontologies and semantic artefacts. It evaluates semantic artefacts using 61 assessment questions derived from the O'FAIRe methodology and produces FAIR scores aligned with the FAIR principles.

definition.value: An activity association is an assignment of responsibility to an agent for an activity, indicating that the agent had a role in the activity. It further allows for a plan to be specified, which is the plan intended by the agent to achieve some goals in the context of this activity.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Association provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasAssociatedWith relation from an prov:Activity to some prov:Agent that had some responsiblity for it. For example, :baking prov:wasAssociatedWith :baker; prov:qualifiedAssociation [ a prov:Association; prov:agent :baker; :foo :bar ].

description.en: MARLEY (Monitoring deep-seA coRaL EcosYstems) is a deep seafloor observing system dedicated to the monitoring of cold-water coral habitats. The system has been deployed in the Lampaul Canyon off Brittany, France since August 2021 and is maintained annually during the ChEReef-Obs cruises. The study site is a coral garden dominated by Madrepora oculata located on a sedimented platform at 780 m depth.
description.fr: MARLEY (Monitoring deep-seA coRaL EcosYstems) est un système d’observation des grands fonds dédié au suivi des habitats de coraux d’eau froide. Le système est déployé dans le canyon de Lampaul au large de la Bretagne depuis août 2021 et est maintenu chaque année lors des campagnes ChEReef-Obs. Le site étudié correspond à un jardin de coraux dominé par Madrepora oculata situé sur une plateforme sédimentaire à 780 m de profondeur.

note.value: L’observatoire MARLEY est déployé depuis 2021 afin de suivre les écosystèmes de coraux d’eau froide à 780 m de profondeur dans le canyon de Lampaul.

definition.value: Generation is the completion of production of a new entity by an activity. This entity did not exist before generation and becomes available for usage after this generation.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Generation provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:wasGeneratedBy relation from a generated prov:Entity to the prov:Activity that generated it. For example, :cake prov:wasGeneratedBy :baking; prov:qualifiedGeneration [ a prov:Generation; prov:activity :baking; :foo :bar ].

comment.en: It is not recommended that the type AgentInfluence be asserted without also asserting one of its more specific subclasses.

definition.value: Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) este o metodologie și o aplicație web de evaluare automată a FAIRness, bazate pe metadate, pentru ontologii și artefacte semantice. Evaluează artefactele semantice folosind 61 de întrebări de evaluare derivate din metodologia O'FAIRe și produce scoruri FAIR aliniate la principiile FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) er en metadatabasert metodikk og webapplikasjon for automatisk vurdering av FAIRness for ontologier og semantiske artefakter. Den evaluerer semantiske artefakter ved hjelp av 61 vurderingsspørsmål basert på O'FAIRe-metodikken og produserer FAIR-poeng i samsvar med FAIR-prinsippene.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) est une méthodologie et une application web d’évaluation automatique de la FAIRness, fondées sur les métadonnées, pour les ontologies et les artefacts sémantiques. Elle évalue les artefacts sémantiques à l’aide de 61 questions d’évaluation issues de la méthodologie O'FAIRe et produit des scores FAIR conformes aux principes FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) è una metodologia e un'applicazione web per la valutazione automatica della FAIRness, basata sui metadati, per ontologie e artefatti semantici. Valuta gli artefatti semantici mediante 61 domande di valutazione derivate dalla metodologia O'FAIRe e produce punteggi FAIR conformi ai principi FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) é uma metodologia e uma aplicação web de avaliação automática da FAIRness, baseada em metadados, para ontologias e artefactos semânticos. Avalia os artefactos semânticos utilizando 61 questões de avaliação derivadas da metodologia O'FAIRe e produz pontuações FAIR alinhadas com os princípios FAIR.

Το Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) είναι μια μεθοδολογία και διαδικτυακή εφαρμογή αυτόματης αξιολόγησης της FAIRness, βασισμένη σε μεταδεδομένα, για οντολογίες και σημασιολογικά τεχνουργήματα. Αξιολογεί τα σημασιολογικά τεχνουργήματα χρησιμοποιώντας 61 ερωτήσεις αξιολόγησης που προέρχονται από τη μεθοδολογία O'FAIRe και παράγει βαθμολογίες FAIR ευθυγραμμισμένες με τις αρχές FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) es una metodología y una aplicación web de evaluación automática de la FAIRness, basadas en metadatos, para ontologías y artefactos semánticos. Evalúa los artefactos semánticos mediante 61 preguntas de evaluación derivadas de la metodología O'FAIRe y genera puntuaciones FAIR alineadas con los principios FAIR.

Ontology FAIRness Evaluator (O'FAIRe) is a metadata-based automatic FAIRness assessment methodology and web application for ontologies and semantic artefacts. It evaluates semantic artefacts using 61 assessment questions derived from the O'FAIRe methodology and produces FAIR scores aligned with the FAIR principles.

description.en:
CLASS will deliver the knowledge and understanding of the Atlantic Ocean system that society needs to make evidence-based decisions regarding ocean management.

We aim to address key knowledge gaps in our understanding of ocean variability, climate regulation and ocean services, and to assess how the ocean will evolve as a result of climate change and intensified human exploitation.

CLASS will be delivered through an Atlantic focused science programme, building on sustained ocean observation, world class model development and state of the art technology, delivered through Marine National Capability underpinning activities.

note.value: CLASS

definition.value: UK research project focused on the Atlantic Ocean system, ocean variability, climate regulation and sustained ocean observation.

description.en:
MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) is an eight-year project funded by the ANR.

The MARMOR project has two objectives:

to structure the French scientific community by providing the Epos-France research infrastructure (formerly Résif) with the equipment required to conduct high-level research using submarine seismology and geodesy tools,

to establish an underwater observation infrastructure in Mayotte in order to ensure continuous, real-time, 24/7 seismological monitoring and to support multidisciplinary research on the phenomena associated with the ongoing seismo-volcanic crisis.
description.fr:
MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) est un projet d’une durée de huit ans financé par l’ANR.

Le projet MARMOR a un double objectif :

structurer la communauté scientifique française en fournissant à l’infrastructure de recherche Epos-France (anciennement Résif) les équipements nécessaires pour conduire des recherches d’excellence utilisant les outils de la sismologie et de la géodésie sous-marines,

mettre en place une infrastructure d’observation sous-marine à Mayotte afin d’assurer une surveillance sismologique continue, en temps réel et 24/7, et de conduire des recherches multidisciplinaires sur les phénomènes associés à la crise sismo-volcanique en cours.

definition.value: Projet ANR d’une durée de huit ans visant à développer des équipements géophysiques marins avancés et un observatoire sous-marin multidisciplinaire pour le suivi à long terme de la crise sismo-volcanique de Mayotte.
Eight-year ANR-funded project developing advanced marine geophysical instrumentation and a multidisciplinary underwater observatory for long-term monitoring of the Mayotte seismo-volcanic crisis.

description.en:
The ATLANTIC WHALE DEAL aims to make sure that ships don't accidentally hit whales in the Atlantic Area.

Partners from different countries are working together to prevent these collisions that can damage biodiversity, trying out new and smart technologies to reduce ship strikes. They want to help the environment by capturing carbon (which is good for the planet) and making sure the ecosystem works well. This involves localization techniques to find whales, making maps to show where there's a risk of collisions, and creating tools to reduce noise in the ocean.

A team of experts in physics, engineering, biology, statistics, design, and social economics from four countries is teaming up with different organizations like the government, non-profit groups, schools, and businesses. The goal is to find solutions that work well and help society while also taking care of the planet.

ATLANTIC WHALE DEAL believes that by protecting whales, they're also making a positive impact on the world by keeping the environment healthy and preserving biodiversity.

definition.value: Interreg Atlantic Area project aiming to reduce whale-ship collisions and support biodiversity protection in the Atlantic Area.
Projet Interreg Espace Atlantique visant à réduire les collisions entre navires et baleines et à soutenir la protection de la biodiversité dans l’espace atlantique.

description.no: Det integrerte LIFE-prosjektet Marha (Marine Habitats) har som mål å gjenopprette og opprettholde en god bevaringstilstand for naturlige marine habitater i fastlands-Frankrike. Fra 2018 til 2025 ble mer enn 650 tiltak innen vurdering, utprøving, forvaltning, bevisstgjøring og opplæring gjennomført, med deltakelse fra alle aktører involvert i forvaltningen av marine Natura 2000-områder.
description.pt: O projeto integrado LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) tem como objetivo restaurar e manter o bom estado de conservação dos habitats marinhos naturais na França continental. Entre 2018 e 2025, foram implementadas mais de 650 ações de avaliação, experimentação, gestão, sensibilização e formação, mobilizando todos os atores envolvidos na gestão dos sítios Natura 2000 marinhos.
description.el: Το ολοκληρωμένο πρόγραμμα LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) στοχεύει στην αποκατάσταση και διατήρηση της καλής κατάστασης διατήρησης των φυσικών θαλάσσιων οικοτόπων στη μητροπολιτική Γαλλία. Από το 2018 έως το 2025, υλοποιήθηκαν περισσότερες από 650 δράσεις αξιολόγησης, πειραματισμού, διαχείρισης, ευαισθητοποίησης και κατάρτισης, κινητοποιώντας το σύνολο των φορέων που εμπλέκονται στη διαχείριση των θαλάσσιων περιοχών Natura 2000.
description.en: The LIFE Integrated Project Marha (Marine Habitats) aims to restore and maintain the favourable conservation status of natural marine habitats in mainland France. From 2018 to 2025, more than 650 actions involving assessment, experimentation, management, awareness-raising and training were implemented, mobilising all stakeholders involved in the management of Natura 2000 marine sites.
description.it: Il progetto LIFE integrato Marha (Marine Habitats) mira a ripristinare e mantenere il buono stato di conservazione degli habitat marini naturali nella Francia metropolitana. Dal 2018 al 2025 sono state realizzate oltre 650 azioni di valutazione, sperimentazione, gestione, sensibilizzazione e formazione, mobilitando tutti gli attori coinvolti nella gestione dei siti Natura 2000 marini.
description.fr: Le projet LIFE intégré Marha (Marine Habitats) vise à rétablir et à maintenir le bon état de conservation des habitats naturels marins en France hexagonale. De 2018 à 2025, plus de 650 actions d’évaluation, d’expérimentation, de gestion, de sensibilisation et de formation ont été mises en œuvre, en mobilisant l’ensemble des acteurs impliqués dans la gestion des sites Natura 2000 en mer.
description.ro: Proiectul integrat LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) are ca obiectiv restabilirea și menținerea unei stări favorabile de conservare a habitatelor marine naturale din Franța continentală. Între 2018 și 2025 au fost implementate peste 650 de acțiuni de evaluare, experimentare, gestionare, sensibilizare și formare, mobilizând toți actorii implicați în gestionarea siturilor marine Natura 2000.
description.es: El proyecto integrado LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) tiene como objetivo restaurar y mantener el buen estado de conservación de los hábitats marinos naturales en la Francia metropolitana. Entre 2018 y 2025, se llevaron a cabo más de 650 acciones de evaluación, experimentación, gestión, sensibilización y formación, movilizando a todos los actores implicados en la gestión de los sitios Natura 2000 en el mar.

definition.value: European LIFE integrated project dedicated to the restoration and conservation of natural marine habitats in mainland France.
Projet intégré LIFE dédié à la restauration et à la conservation des habitats naturels marins en France hexagonale.

definition.value:
Delegation is the assignment of authority and responsibility to an agent (by itself or by another agent) to carry out a specific activity as a delegate or representative, while the agent it acts on behalf of retains some responsibility for the outcome of the delegated work.

For example, a student acted on behalf of his supervisor, who acted on behalf of the department chair, who acted on behalf of the university; all those agents are responsible in some way for the activity that took place but we do not say explicitly who bears responsibility and to what degree.

comment.en: An instance of prov:Delegation provides additional descriptions about the binary prov:actedOnBehalfOf relation from a performing prov:Agent to some prov:Agent for whom it was performed. For example, :mixing prov:wasAssociatedWith :toddler . :toddler prov:actedOnBehalfOf :mother; prov:qualifiedDelegation [ a prov:Delegation; prov:entity :mother; :foo :bar ].

description.en:
The ATLANTIC WHALE DEAL aims to make sure that ships don't accidentally hit whales in the Atlantic Area.

Partners from different countries are working together to prevent these collisions that can damage biodiversity, trying out new and smart technologies to reduce ship strikes. They want to help the environment by capturing carbon (which is good for the planet) and making sure the ecosystem works well. This involves localization techniques to find whales, making maps to show where there's a risk of collisions, and creating tools to reduce noise in the ocean.

A team of experts in physics, engineering, biology, statistics, design, and social economics from four countries is teaming up with different organizations like the government, non-profit groups, schools, and businesses. The goal is to find solutions that work well and help society while also taking care of the planet.

ATLANTIC WHALE DEAL believes that by protecting whales, they're also making a positive impact on the world by keeping the environment healthy and preserving biodiversity.

definition.value: Interreg Atlantic Area project aiming to reduce whale-ship collisions and support biodiversity protection in the Atlantic Area.
Projet Interreg Espace Atlantique visant à réduire les collisions entre navires et baleines et à soutenir la protection de la biodiversité dans l’espace atlantique.

description.no: Det integrerte LIFE-prosjektet Marha (Marine Habitats) har som mål å gjenopprette og opprettholde en god bevaringstilstand for naturlige marine habitater i fastlands-Frankrike. Fra 2018 til 2025 ble mer enn 650 tiltak innen vurdering, utprøving, forvaltning, bevisstgjøring og opplæring gjennomført, med deltakelse fra alle aktører involvert i forvaltningen av marine Natura 2000-områder.
description.pt: O projeto integrado LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) tem como objetivo restaurar e manter o bom estado de conservação dos habitats marinhos naturais na França continental. Entre 2018 e 2025, foram implementadas mais de 650 ações de avaliação, experimentação, gestão, sensibilização e formação, mobilizando todos os atores envolvidos na gestão dos sítios Natura 2000 marinhos.
description.el: Το ολοκληρωμένο πρόγραμμα LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) στοχεύει στην αποκατάσταση και διατήρηση της καλής κατάστασης διατήρησης των φυσικών θαλάσσιων οικοτόπων στη μητροπολιτική Γαλλία. Από το 2018 έως το 2025, υλοποιήθηκαν περισσότερες από 650 δράσεις αξιολόγησης, πειραματισμού, διαχείρισης, ευαισθητοποίησης και κατάρτισης, κινητοποιώντας το σύνολο των φορέων που εμπλέκονται στη διαχείριση των θαλάσσιων περιοχών Natura 2000.
description.en: The LIFE Integrated Project Marha (Marine Habitats) aims to restore and maintain the favourable conservation status of natural marine habitats in mainland France. From 2018 to 2025, more than 650 actions involving assessment, experimentation, management, awareness-raising and training were implemented, mobilising all stakeholders involved in the management of Natura 2000 marine sites.
description.it: Il progetto LIFE integrato Marha (Marine Habitats) mira a ripristinare e mantenere il buono stato di conservazione degli habitat marini naturali nella Francia metropolitana. Dal 2018 al 2025 sono state realizzate oltre 650 azioni di valutazione, sperimentazione, gestione, sensibilizzazione e formazione, mobilitando tutti gli attori coinvolti nella gestione dei siti Natura 2000 marini.
description.fr: Le projet LIFE intégré Marha (Marine Habitats) vise à rétablir et à maintenir le bon état de conservation des habitats naturels marins en France hexagonale. De 2018 à 2025, plus de 650 actions d’évaluation, d’expérimentation, de gestion, de sensibilisation et de formation ont été mises en œuvre, en mobilisant l’ensemble des acteurs impliqués dans la gestion des sites Natura 2000 en mer.
description.ro: Proiectul integrat LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) are ca obiectiv restabilirea și menținerea unei stări favorabile de conservare a habitatelor marine naturale din Franța continentală. Între 2018 și 2025 au fost implementate peste 650 de acțiuni de evaluare, experimentare, gestionare, sensibilizare și formare, mobilizând toți actorii implicați în gestionarea siturilor marine Natura 2000.
description.es: El proyecto integrado LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) tiene como objetivo restaurar y mantener el buen estado de conservación de los hábitats marinos naturales en la Francia metropolitana. Entre 2018 y 2025, se llevaron a cabo más de 650 acciones de evaluación, experimentación, gestión, sensibilización y formación, movilizando a todos los actores implicados en la gestión de los sitios Natura 2000 en el mar.

definition.value: European LIFE integrated project dedicated to the restoration and conservation of natural marine habitats in mainland France.

spaciallyIntersects(P1, P2) :- lat(P1, LAT), long(P1, LONG), alt(P1, ALT),

sameThing(P1, P2) :- type(P1, Point), type(P2, Point), spaciallyIntersects(P1, P2).

description.en: The E1M3A marine observatory is a pioneer station, the first open-ocean buoy in the Mediterranean deployed in January 2000 and currently part of the POSEIDON network since 2007. The Poseidon system operates a network of fixed measuring floats, which are moored at various locations in the Aegean and Ionian seas delivering near-real-time observations on important marine and atmospheric parameters. The oceanographic buoys constitute the backbone of the POSEIDON system and they are linked to both global and regional networks such as the OceanSITES and M3A’s respectively. In particular the POSEIDON E1 M3A buoy (WMO 61277) is the founder component of the Cretan Sea observatory complemented with several other platforms such as glider, FerryBox and a coastal buoy and is currently the most heavily equipped physical–biogeochemical observing site of the POSEIDON system.

definition.value: A long-term open-ocean observatory site in the Cretan Sea, centred on the POSEIDON E1-M3A buoy, integrated within the POSEIDON, OceanSITES and JERICO-RI observing networks.

Un site d’observation hauturier à long terme situé en mer de Crète, centré sur la bouée POSEIDON E1-M3A et intégré aux réseaux d’observation POSEIDON, OceanSITES et JERICO-RI.
